title: HorizonUI
description: Bring a modern, clean, and customizable user interface to Minecraft. HorizonUI focuses on visual clarity, animated backgrounds, and layout refinement to deliver a fresh and immersive UI experience.
body:
![HorizonUI](https://github.com/nokarin-dev/horizonui/blob/main/assets/HorizonUI_Banner.png?raw=true)
![Environment](https://img.shields.io/badge/Enviroment-Client-purple?style=for-the-badge) [![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-ARR-green?style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/nokarin-dev/HorizonUI/blob/main/LICENSE) [![Issues](https://img.shields.io/github/issues/nokarin-dev/horizonui?style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/nokarin-dev/HorizonUI/issues) [![Release](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/nokarin-dev/horizonui?style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/nokarin-dev/HorizonUI/releases) [![Github Star](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/nokarin-dev/horizonui?style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/nokarin-dev/horizonui) [![Github](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/nokarin-dev/horizonui/total?logo=github&labelColor=grat&color=black&style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/nokarin-dev/horizonui/releases) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?color=158000&label=downloads&prefix=+%20&query=downloads&url=https://api.modrinth.com/v2/project/90mpuiZs&logo=modrinth&style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/horizonui) [![CurseForge](https://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/full_999424_downloads.svg?badge_style=for_the_badge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/horizonui) Bring a modern, clean, and customizable user interface to Minecraft. HorizonUI focuses on visual clarity, animated backgrounds, and layout refinement to deliver a fresh and immersive UI experience.
--- ![Installation](https://github.com/nokarin-dev/horizonui/blob/main/assets/Installation_Banner.png?raw=true) 1. Download the HorizonUI .jar file from one of the trusted platforms below: - [CurseForge] - [Modrinth] 2. Place the downloaded file into your Minecraft mods folder: - Windows: C:\Users\\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\mods - Linux/macOS: ~/.minecraft/mods 3. Launch Minecraft using a supported mod loader. HorizonUI will activate automatically when the game starts > **Using a custom launcher?** MultiMC, Prism Launcher, GDLauncher, and other custom launchers are fully supported. Simply add the mod to the instance’s mods folder or import it via the launcher’s built‑in mod manager. --- ![Usage](https://github.com/nokarin-dev/horizonui/blob/main/assets/Usage_Banner.png?raw=true) Once installed, HorizonUI integrates directly into the game UI. You can configure HorizonUI through: - The in‑game **Mod Configuration** screen - Resource Packs for background customization Changes are applied in real time or after a screen reload, depending on the setting. --- ![Compatibility](https://github.com/nokarin-dev/horizonui/blob/main/assets/Compatibility_Banner.png?raw=true) HorizonUI focuses heavily on UI customization, including layout structure and background rendering. As a result, **mods that also modify Minecraft’s user interface or background systems may conflict**. **Potential sources of incompatibility include**: - Mods that overhaul or replace the main menu or HUD - Shader mods that affect 2D UI layers or post‑processing - Mods that alter how background textures are loaded or rendered **If you encounter issues**: - Temporarily disable other UI‑related mods. - Check whether shader packs affect UI rendering. - Restart the game after modifying resource packs. - Report confirmed conflicts on the GitHub issue tracker. --- ![Recommendations](https://github.com/nokarin-dev/horizonui/blob/main/assets/Recommendations_Banner.png?raw=true) To achieve the best visual experience with HorizonUI, it is highly recommended to use **font customization mods** that replace Minecraft’s default font. Suggested mods: - [BetterFonts](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/betterfonts) - [Smooth Font](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/smooth-font) - [Caxton](https://modrinth.com/mod/caxton) Using modern fonts such as **Poppins**, **Inter**, or **Segoe UI** significantly improves readability and overall UI consistency. --- ![FAQ](https://github.com/nokarin-dev/horizonui/blob/main/assets/FAQ_Banner.png?raw=true)
Open Here - **Why isn't the animated background showing up?** - Animated backgrounds are distributed separately as resource packs to keep the main mod lightweight and performant. You can download them from [Han's Official Discord Server] or make it manually. - **I've downloaded the animated background, but it's still not showing on the title screen. Why?** - Make sure you've enabled the background resource pack in the _Resource Packs_ menu. Then, go to the mod configuration screen to select your desired background. - **What's the minimum system requirement to run this mod smoothly?** - We recommend allocating at least 4–6 GB of RAM, and using a processor equivalent to Intel Core i5 8th Gen or better with an integrated GPU. - **Where do I report bugs or issues?** - Please report any bugs or issues on the [HorizonUI GitHub Repository]. - **Is HorizonUI compatible with other UI or shader mods?** - HorizonUI aims to be compatible with most mods, but UI or shader mods may conflict. If you find issues, try disabling other mods temporarily or report the conflict to us. - **How do I reset HorizonUI settings to default?** - You can delete the HorizonUI configuration file found in the `config/horizonui` folder within your Minecraft directory. - **Does HorizonUI support older versions of Minecraft?** - Yes, but updates are released gradually per version. If your version isn't supported yet, please wait for upcoming releases.
--- ![Credits](https://github.com/nokarin-dev/horizonui/blob/main/assets/Credits_Banner.png?raw=true) Special thanks to everyone who contributed to HorizonUI: - **nokarin** - Lead Developer, UI Designer, Code QA, Translator, Mod Tester - **Han's** - Founder, UI Designer, Translator - **AetherLumine** - Translator - **howtoscriptinpython** - Russian & Ukrainian Translator - **ExplerHD** - Mod Tester - **noxzym** - Mod Tester - **alfaruqi** - Translator (Arabic, Brazilian Portuguese, Mexican Spanish, Italian, German, Georgian) - **yunfan_adofai** - Chinese Translator --- ![License](https://github.com/nokarin-dev/horizonui/blob/main/assets/License_Banner.png?raw=true) ``` HorizonUI: Java Edition is licensed under an All Rights Reserved License. - © 2026 Han's Projects. - © 2026 HorizonUI: Java Edition - All Rights Reserved. - © 2019-2026 Strivo Development - All Rights Reserved. ``` [Modrinth]: https://modrinth.com/mod/horizonui [CurseForge]: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/horizonui [Website]: https://strivo.xyz/project/HorizonUI/download [HorizonUI Github Repository]: https://github.com/nokarin-dev/HorizonUI/issues [Han's Official Discord Server]: https://discord.com/invite/PgfBrGrd9b
